options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <check_value> # Value of the setup or hold time for the check

options.name: -clock
options.description: Name of the clock that triggers the data event for the related (-from) pin

options.name: -fall_from
options.description: Checks at the rising edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -fall_to
options.description: Checks at the falling edge of the signal on the to pins

options.name: -from
options.description: Checks both the rising and the falling edges

options.name: -hold
options.description: Data check value is for hold check

options.name: -rise_from
options.description: Checks at the falling edge of the signal on the from pins

options.name: -rise_to
options.description: Checks at the rising edge of the signal on the to pins

options.name: -setup
options.description: Data check value is for setup check

options.name: -to
options.description: Checks both the rising and the falling edges
